inputs.label: Vehicle Price
inputs.businessContext: Total price of the vehicle including any additional fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total price of the vehicle including any additional fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ek ücretler dahil aracın toplam fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtpreis des Fahrzeugs inklusive aller zusätzlichen Gebühren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix total du véhicule, frais supplémentaires inclus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio total del vehículo incluyendo cualquier cargo adicional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الإجمالي للمركبة بما في ذلك أي رسوم إضافية.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Amount paid upfront that reduces the loan principal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount paid upfront that reduces the loan principal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi anaparasını azaltan peşin ödenen tutar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant versé d'avance qui réduit le capital du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad pagada por adelantado que reduce el capital del préstamo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ المدفوع مقدمًا الذي يقلل من أصل القرض.

inputs.label: Trade-In Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of a vehicle traded in, which reduces the amount to finance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of a vehicle traded in, which reduces the amount to finance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takas edilen aracın değeri, finanse edilecek tutarı azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert eines in Zahlung gegebenen Fahrzeugs, der den zu finanzierenden Betrag reduziert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur d'un véhicule repris, qui réduit le montant à financer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de un vehículo entregado como parte de pago, que reduce el monto a financiar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة المركبة المبادلة، مما يقلل المبلغ المراد تمويله.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage on the taxable amount (vehicle price minus trade-in).

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage on the taxable amount (vehicle price minus trade-in).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiye tabi tutar (araç fiyatı eksi takas) üzerinden uygulanan satış vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Umsatzsteuerprozentsatz auf den steuerpflichtigen Betrag (Fahrzeugpreis abzüglich Inzahlungnahme).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe de vente applicable sur le montant imposable (prix du véhicule moins reprise).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto a las ventas aplicable sobre el monto gravable (precio del vehículo menos valor de intercambio).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة المبيعات المطبقة على المبلغ الخاضع للضريبة (سعر المركبة ناقص قيمة المبادلة).

inputs.label: Interest Rate (APR)
inputs.businessContext: Annual Percentage Rate for the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual Percentage Rate for the loan.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux annuel effectif global du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de porcentaje anual para el préstamo.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the loan in months.
